The witnesses note the the curse of Jotham: fulfilled. The witnesses note the God not mocked: be not deceived; God is not mocked (Gal. 6:7). The expositors observe the all the evil of Shechem: their bloodguilt. The expositors observe the God render upon their heads: the recompense. The expositors observe the the curse of Jotham: fulfilled. The expositors observe the God not mocked: be not deceived; God is not mocked (Gal. 6:7). The believer is taught to mark the all the evil of Shechem, the God render upon their heads, the the curse of Jotham, the God not mocked, and to fear the God who renders to every man his due. The verse thus records that God rendered the evil of Shechem upon their heads, the curse of Jotham fulfilled — God recompensing the partners in sin as surely as the chief offender, his judgments surely coming, be not deceived, God is not mocked (Gal. 6:7; Judg. 9:20).
